sector_A.label: Sector A: scalar + longitudinal
sector_A.kernel: A_ij(k) = f(k) δ_ij + g(k) k_i k_j / k²
sector_A.tensor_structure: contains both trace (delta) and longitudinal (k_i k_j) components
sector_A.physical_interpretation: encodes isotropic and anisotropic scaling contributions

exact_reconstruction.holds_to_order: exact at all orders in the kernel decomposition
exact_reconstruction.note: The decomposition is exact by construction: A_ij + B_ij reconstructs the full kernel before integration
